script.title: Configure Your Sales Script
script.description: Set up your ideal sales process that your sales team should follow
details: Go to the Rubric page in the sidebar
Click 'Create Script' to add a new sales script
Add a name and description for your script
Define sections (e.g., Greeting, Discovery, Demo, Closing)
For each section, add instructions and tips
The system will automatically generate evaluation criteria
tips: Be specific in your section instructions for better AI analysis
Include tips that help your sales team understand what good looks like
You can create multiple scripts for different call types

upload.title: Upload a Sales Call
upload.description: Submit call recordings or transcripts for AI analysis
details: Navigate to Upload Call in the sidebar
Enter the sales person's name and email
Select which sales script to evaluate against
Choose upload method: Audio file or paste transcript
For audio: Upload MP3, WAV, or M4A files (max 25MB)
For transcript: Paste the call transcript directly
Click 'Analyze Call' to start the AI evaluation
tips: Audio files are automatically transcribed using AI
Clear audio quality produces better transcriptions
Include speaker labels in transcripts when pasting manually

review.title: Review AI Analysis
review.description: See detailed feedback on how well the sales person followed the script
details: View the overall score (sections covered vs total)
See pass/fail status for each evaluation criterion
Read specific feedback for each section
Review strengths highlighted by the AI
Check suggested areas for improvement
Access the full call transcript for reference
tips: The AI evaluates based on your script sections
Feedback is constructive and actionable
Use the transcript to verify AI observations

email.title: Send Coaching Email
email.description: Deliver personalized feedback directly to the sales person
details: After analysis, click 'Send Coaching Email'
The email is sent to the sales person's email address
Email includes score, summary, and detailed feedback
Sales people receive actionable tips for improvement
Call is automatically saved to history
tips: Emails are branded and professional
Sales people can review feedback at their own pace
Consider following up on areas needing improvement

track.title: Track Performance
track.description: Monitor trends and identify coaching opportunities
details: Calls: View all analyzed calls with search and filters
Filter by sales person name, date range, or score
Click any call to see full details and transcript
Track pass rates by criteria across all calls
Identify which script sections need more training
tips: Regular review helps identify training patterns
Low-performing criteria indicate coaching opportunities
Use filters to focus on specific sales people or periods

insights.title: Generate Team Insights
insights.description: Use pattern recognition to optimize your sales script based on real performance data
details: Navigate to Script Intelligence in the sidebar
Select a sales script from the dropdown
Click 'Generate Insights' to analyze all calls using that script
The system groups calls by outcome: Closed, Not Closed, and Partial
AI analyzes patterns across all groups and generates insights
Review the DO's - best practices from successful closers
Review the DON'Ts - behaviors that lose deals
Study common objections and how closers handle them
Review the pre-call checklist and suggested optimized script
Click 'Save as New Script' to create an improved script based on insights
Send insights as a Weekly Bulletin email to your entire team
tips: You need at least 5-10 calls per script for meaningful insights
Insights are based on REAL performance data, not theory
This is pattern recognition, not full reinforcement learning - it identifies what works in your specific context
Save successful patterns as new scripts to test in the field
Share weekly bulletins with your team to align on best practices

faqs.a: We support MP3, WAV, M4A, and most common audio formats. Files must be under 25MB. For larger files, consider compressing or splitting the recording.

faqs.q: How accurate is the AI transcription?
faqs.a: Our AI transcription uses OpenAI Whisper, which is highly accurate for clear audio. For best results, ensure good audio quality with minimal background noise.

faqs.q: Can I edit the generated criteria?
faqs.a: Currently, criteria are auto-generated based on your script sections. You can modify the script and sections to adjust what gets evaluated.

faqs.q: How does the AI scoring work?
faqs.a: The AI reads the transcript and compares it against your defined script sections. Each section is marked as 'covered' or 'not covered' based on whether the sales person addressed the key points.

faqs.q: Can I use different AI models?
faqs.a: Yes! In the Rubric settings, you can choose between OpenAI GPT-4o Mini (fast and economical) or Google Gemini 2.5 (more powerful analysis).

faqs.q: Why can't I send emails to other addresses?
faqs.a: For MVP/testing, emails are restricted to the registered account. To send to any email, a custom domain needs to be verified in Resend settings.

faqs.q: How do I create multiple scripts?
faqs.a: Go to Rubric, click 'Create Script', and define a new script with its own sections. When uploading calls, select which script to evaluate against.

Insights uses pattern recognition to analyze all your calls grouped by outcome (Closed, Not Closed, Partial). It identifies what successful closers have in common, what non-closers do wrong, common objections, and generates a suggested optimized script. This is different from reinforcement learning - it's data-driven pattern matching based on your actual call data.

faqs.q: How is Insights different from Reinforcement Learning?
faqs.a: True reinforcement learning would automatically iterate on scripts based on continuous feedback loops with reward signals. Insights is one level simpler: it's pattern recognition + script generation. You upload calls, we analyze patterns and suggest improvements. You then decide whether to test the new script. Future versions could automate the iteration loop.

faqs.q: How many calls do I need to generate insights?
faqs.a: While you can generate insights with fewer calls, 5-10 calls per script provides meaningful patterns. With more calls, especially diverse sales team outcomes, patterns become more statistically significant.

faqs.q: Can I customize the insights analysis?
faqs.a: Currently, the AI analyzes based on call outcomes and transcripts against your script. The analysis includes DO's, DON'Ts, common objections, and a suggested script. Future versions could allow custom analysis parameters.

Roadmap.title: Post-MVP Roadmap
Roadmap.subtitle: After the MVP (Starter → Pro → Pro + RAG), here's how Ask Moses can continue to evolve.

Reusability.title: Built to Evolve
Reusability.subtitle: Every component we build in the MVP is designed to scale with your product. This is production-ready code, not a throwaway prototype.

rubric.reusabilityReason: Core CRUD logic, database schema, and UI components remain unchanged. Only minor additions for team-based filtering.

upload.reusabilityReason: File processing and transcription pipeline reused. Upload UI becomes secondary input method alongside webhooks.

analysis.reusabilityReason: AI prompts, scoring logic, and analysis pipeline are fully reusable. Only adds output destinations (CRM, real-time).

email.reusabilityReason: Email templates, sending logic, and formatting are 100% reusable. Future phases only change when/how it's triggered.

summary.reusabilityReason: Data aggregation queries and summary generation reused. Phase 3 adds new visualizations on top of same data layer.

history.reusabilityReason: Database queries, filtering logic, and table components fully reused. Future phases extend with additional columns and views.

Pricing.title: Choose Your Starting Point
Pricing.subtitle: All tiers include production-ready code you own. ~90% reusable as you scale.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Week 1-2: Validate the core AI coaching value with manual workflow

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Week 3: Automated call ingestion for hands-off operation

proRag.name: Pro + RAG
proRag.description: Week 4: Context-aware coaching powered by your training materials

upgrade.title: Upgrade Path
upgrade.note: Start with Starter to validate fast. Upgrade anytime — your codebase is built to evolve.

ongoing.title: Ongoing Costs (Post-MVP)
ongoing.perCallNote: Based on average call duration: 12.5 minutes (range: 5-20 min)
ongoing.perCallFootnote: *Based on 12.5-minute average call. Includes email delivery (~$0.001).
ongoing.ragTitle: RAG Knowledge Base Costs (Pro + RAG tier)
ongoing.ragNote: Audio files require transcription before indexing
ongoing.ragFootnote: *One-time cost per document. Text documents (PDFs, docs) only require embedding (~$0.0001 each).

Team.title: Team & Timeline
Team.aiBuilderDesc: Rapid prototyping and validation using AI-assisted development tools (v0, Vercel, AI SDK)

Appendix.label: Appendix
Appendix.title: Detailed Deliverables
Appendix.subtitle: Comprehensive breakdown of what is included in each tier. This serves as the scope contract for the engagement.
Appendix.disclaimerBody: Any features, integrations, or modifications not explicitly listed above are considered out of scope and will require a separate agreement. Changes to scope during development may affect timeline and pricing.

items.text: Single active script at a time
Customize system prompt for AI analysis
Input sales person name and email manually
Fetches criteria + system prompt from Supabase
Full transcript display for admin review
Manual send coaching email via Resend
Auto-save call to database after email send
Search by sales person name or email
View individual call details with full analysis

items: Automatic call ingestion when call ends
Support for PDFs, docs, text files

Hero.badge: AI sales coaching, powered by data science
Hero.titlePart1: Most businesses don't have a lead problem. They have a
Hero.subtitle: Your best sales rep has a secret. AskMoses finds it, analyzes it, and replicates it across your entire team automatically.
Hero.dashboardAlt: AskMoses.AI dashboard showing team conversion metrics, close rate, monthly revenue, and conversion rate trend chart

Problem.title: You're paying for leads. You're losing them on the phone.
Problem.body: Your top closer wins deals your average rep blows. Same leads. Same script. Different outcomes. Without data, you're guessing why, and your marketing spend is paying the price.

HowItWorks.title: From conversation to conversion in 4 steps.
HowItWorks.subtitle: No new tools to learn. No workflow disruption. Just better outcomes.

listen.title: Listen
listen.description: AskMoses ingests every inbound and outbound call across your entire team, automatically.

identify.title: Identify
identify.description: Pinpoints the exact behaviors, phrases, and patterns that separate closers from coasters.

evaluate.title: Evaluate
evaluate.description: Scores every call against your custom rubric with statistical correlation to real outcomes.

scale.title: Scale
scale.description: Replicates what works across the team with targeted coaching, scripts, and rep dashboards.

Benefits.title: Built to turn conversations into closed deals.

differentiator.body: AskMoses doesn't just record calls, it applies data science to identify which specific behaviors statistically drive conversions in your business.

data.title: Real data, not guesswork
data.description: Every coaching decision backed by statistical analysis of hundreds of real calls.

rubric.title: Custom rubric
rubric.description: Not generic advice. Your sales methodology, optimized with AI.

sellMore.title: Sell more without spending more
sellMore.description: Same marketing budget, same lead volume, better conversion rate.

Industries.title: Built for businesses that close on the phone.
Industries.subtitle: If your customers call before they buy, AskMoses turns those calls into revenue.

Pricing.title: Pick the plan that fits how you grow.
Pricing.footnote: * $2/call usage fee applies to all plans. Billed monthly based on actual call volume. No minimum commitment on calls.

solo.name: Solo
solo.description: AI sales coaching for independent operators ready to close more of the leads they already have.
features: AI call scoring on every inbound call
Custom rubric based on your training method

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: AskMoses plus full-service marketing. The complete revenue loop for service businesses ready to scale.
features: AI-generated ad copy from your call data

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For franchise groups, multi-location operators, and training networks that need portfolio-level intelligence.

Demo.subtitle: Book a free 20-minute demo. No commitment.
bullets: Walkthrough on your real call data
See a sample rubric scored live

CtaBand.title: Ready to turn more calls into customers?

Intent.subtitle: 4 signals that indicate conversion probability

financial.name: Financial
financial.question: Did the person react to the price with curiosity or demonstrate resistance?
financial.description: Evaluates if the prospect showed genuine interest or concern about the investment.

urgency.name: Urgency
urgency.question: Is there a specific and painful event motivating the call or is it just casual interest?
urgency.description: Measures if there's an immediate need or if it's just exploring options.

authority.name: Authority
authority.question: Does the person on the call have the power to make the final decision without consulting anyone else?
authority.description: Identifies if the prospect is a decision-maker or needs approval.

engagement.name: Engagement
engagement.question: Is she asking detailed questions and thinking about next steps, or giving short and vague answers?
engagement.description: Evaluates the level of active interest and involvement in the conversation.

Intent.configSubtitle: Configure the weight of each signal in calculating intent. Weights must sum to exactly 100%.
